schema.ion.id › core › payment › v1

core/payment/v1

Pack IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/payment/v1#  |  Layer: L4 — Cross-sector core  |  Version: v1

context.jsonld attributes.yaml vocab.jsonld

Schemas in this pack

PaymentDeclaration

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/payment/v1#PaymentDeclaration

PropertyMandatoryDescription
method—
collectedBy—Which network participant collects payment from consumer.
timing—When payment is collected relative to fulfilment.
status—
amount—Payment amount in IDR
currency—
paidAt—Timestamp of successful payment confirmation
gatewayRef—Payment gateway transaction reference ID
methodDetail—
paymentRail—Specific rail used for this payment. Enables downstream routing and reconciliation regardless of higher-level method. Ex
paymentGatewayProvider—Payment gateway aggregator used to route this payment. Declared per transaction. Implementations may use one or more of
creditTerms—
refund—
invoice—
processingFee—

QRIS

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/payment/v1#QRIS

PropertyMandatoryDescription
qrisType—STATIC: single fixed QR, same for all transactions. DYNAMIC: per-transaction QR with embedded amount.
merchantId—QRIS merchant identifier from acquiring bank
nmid—National Merchant ID assigned by Bank Indonesia
terminalId—Terminal/POS identifier for multi-terminal merchants
qrisString—Full QRIS string for QR code rendering
expiresAt—Expiry for DYNAMIC QRIS. UTC (ISO 8601).

VirtualAccount

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/payment/v1#VirtualAccount

PropertyMandatoryDescription
bankCode—Bank issuing the virtual account
vaNumber—Virtual account number to be paid to
amount—Amount encoded in VA (for fixed-amount VA)
currency—
expiresAt—VA expiry timestamp in UTC

EWallet

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/payment/v1#EWallet

PropertyMandatoryDescription
provider—E-wallet provider identifier
accountRef—Consumer's wallet account reference (phone or wallet ID)
amount—
currency—
expiresAt—
deepLink—Deep link to open wallet app for payment

CashOnDelivery

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/payment/v1#CashOnDelivery

PropertyMandatoryDescription
collectionAmount—Expected cash amount to collect from consumer
collectionAmountCollected—Actual cash amount the carrier collected
collectionTimestamp—UTC timestamp of cash handover at delivery
collectionReceiptRef—Receipt reference for the collected cash (scan, photo URL, or receipt ID)
currency—
changeIssuedBy—Who provides change to consumer
maxCodAmount—Maximum COD value allowed per ION network policy
partialCollectionReason—

BankTransfer

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/payment/v1#BankTransfer

PropertyMandatoryDescription
bankCode—Recipient bank code
accountNumber—Recipient bank account number
accountName—Recipient account holder name
transferType—

BISettlement

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/payment/v1#BISettlement

PropertyMandatoryDescription
settlementType—BI_FAST: real-time settlement, max IDR 250 million per transaction. RTGS: high-value same-day settlement, unlimited amou
biRef—BI clearing reference number
settlementAt—Settlement timestamp in UTC
beneficiaryName—
beneficiaryBank—
beneficiaryAccount—
ifscEquivalent—Indonesian equivalent — bank routing code

BNPL

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/payment/v1#BNPL

PropertyMandatoryDescription
provider—BNPL provider name
tenure—Repayment tenure in months
installmentAmount—Per-installment amount in IDR
interestRate—Monthly interest rate as decimal e.g. 0.02 = 2%
totalRepayment—Total repayment amount including interest
currency—
firstPaymentDate—

CardPayment

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/payment/v1#CardPayment

PropertyMandatoryDescription
cardType—
scheme—
maskedPan—Last 4 digits of card for display
bankIssuer—Card-issuing bank name
gatewayRef—Payment gateway transaction reference

CreditTerms

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/payment/v1#CreditTerms

PropertyMandatoryDescription
creditTermsDays—Net payment terms in days from invoice date (e.g. 30 for NET-30, 60 for NET-60)
paymentDueDate—Computed due date for this specific invoice
creditLimit—Total credit limit extended to buyer under the governing FWA / contract
creditAvailable—Credit currently available after open invoices — for ION Central validation at /init
dunningSchedule—Reminder schedule leading up to and past due date

Refund

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/payment/v1#Refund

PropertyMandatoryDescription
refundAmount—Refunded amount in IDR
refundReason—
refundTimeline—Expected time-to-land (ISO 8601 duration, e.g. PT24H, P7D)
refundMethod—REFUND_TO_ORIGINAL is the default (MATI — Merchant Automatically To Instrument). Fallbacks apply when original instrumen
refundInitiatedAt—
refundSettledAt—

InvoiceReference

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/payment/v1#InvoiceReference

PropertyMandatoryDescription
invoiceReference—Seller-issued commercial invoice number
invoiceIssuedAt—
proformaInvoiceReference—Proforma invoice number (pre-shipment, for credit terms)
invoiceUrl—URL to PDF invoice (access-controlled, time-limited)

ProcessingFee

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/payment/v1#ProcessingFee

PropertyMandatoryDescription
amount—Processing fee amount in IDR
currency—
borneBy—Which party bears this fee
splitDetail—When borneBy=SPLIT, how the fee is split

Pack README

ion-core/payment/v1

Indonesian payment method objects and PaymentDeclaration wrapper.

Attaches to

`beckn:Settlement.settlementAttributes`

Payment types

ObjectDescription
QRISQuick Response Code Indonesian Standard (static or dynamic)
VirtualAccountBank virtual account (BCA, BRI, Mandiri, BNI, etc.)
EWalletOVO, DANA, GoPay, LinkAja, ShopeePay, AstraPay, Sakuku
CashOnDeliveryCOD with collection amount and change instructions
BankTransferDirect bank transfer
BISettlementBI-FAST / RTGS / SKN interbank settlement
BNPLBuy Now Pay Later (Kredivo, Akulaku, etc.)
CardPaymentCredit/debit card (Visa, Mastercard, JCB, UnionPay)

PaymentDeclaration

Wraps the specific payment instrument with transaction-level context:

`method`, `collectedBy`, `timing`, `status`, `amount`, `paidAt`, `gatewayRef`, `methodDetail`

Part of schema.ion.id — ION Network vocabulary. Built from schema/extensions/core/payment/v1/ in the ion-network spec. Generated 2026-04-27 18:43 UTC.
